Bet Model % SB Odds Win Payout / $100 Expected Profit / $100 Suggested Stake
Melquizael Costa wins 62% 2.35 +$135 +$46 8.6% of bank
Model % = our model's probability of this outcome  ·  SB Odds = decimal odds on SportsBet (e.g. 3.50 means $100 stake returns $350 if it wins)  ·  Win Payout = net profit on a winning $100 bet  ·  Expected Profit = the long-run average profit per $100 staked, weighted by our model's probability — this is the number that actually matters  ·  Suggested Stake = quarter-Kelly bankroll fraction. Start small.

Model % = our model's probability of this outcome  ·  SB Odds = decimal odds on SportsBet (e.g. 3.50 means $100 stake returns $350 if it wins)  ·  Win Payout = net profit on a winning $100 bet  ·  Expected Profit = the long-run average profit per $100 staked, weighted by our model's probability — this is the number that actually matters  ·  Suggested Stake = quarter-Kelly bankroll fraction. Model % = our model's probability of this outcome  ·  SB Odds = decimal odds on SportsBet (e.g. 3.50 means $100 stake returns $350 if it wins)  ·  Win Payout = net profit on a winning $100 bet  ·  Expected Profit = the long-run average profit per $100 staked, weighted by our model's probability — this is the number that actually matters  ·  Suggested Stake = quarter-Kelly bankroll fraction.
